title: Smiley (disambiguation)
content:
The name '''Smiley''' has been used for two different individuals. You may either be looking for:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Smileredon-Verdont]] a [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] was also known as Smiley
*[[Klorr Vilia]], often referred to as Smiley while under the influence of [[savorium herb]]s

==[[LEGO Star Wars]]==
*[[Smiley (Nexu)|Smiley]], [[Graballa/LEGO|Graballa]] the [[Hutt]]'s pet [[nexu]]
{{Disambig}}
